creator: tomaz.borstnar@over.net
text:
7.0.3 erased my pgsql/data directory when trying to install the new version.

Fix: 

Don't run initdb if pgsql/data directory is present!
How-To-Repeat: Have 7.0.2-based data directory and try to install 7.0.3. Initdb will fail and pgsql/data directory will be deleted after failed initdb.
